Overrides.Override: You take 5% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Strikes

Buffs on you expire 30% slower Debuffs on you expire 30% faster Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Warp

You take 5% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Strikes
Elusive's Effect on you is increased instead for the first 2 seconds Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Agile

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Headhunter Leather Belt Unique ID: 841060b8acfeb8a90583ab97d123d1e52f9af36b28a7cf02e116457d3a48538b Item Level: 83 LevelReq: 8 Implicits: 1 +26 to maximum Life +48 to Strength +40 to Dexterity +50 to maximum Life 21% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
